# Source Record
- Source: Typer documentation home page
- Scope captured: top-level navigation, feature framing, and tutorial/reference structure

# Why It Matters
This is the upstream contract for the CLI framework used in `src/nbadb/cli/app.py` and command modules. It is especially useful for option patterns, command groups, environment variables, and testing guidance.

# Key Excerpts
> The docs explicitly frame Typer as the "FastAPI of CLIs".

> The navigation emphasizes installation, first steps, arguments, options, commands, parameter types, subcommands, prompts, progress bars, and testing.
